reference: MISTER AND MISSUS HATTERSLEY HAVE BEEN STAYING AT THE GROVE A FORTNIGHT AND AS MISTER HARGRAVE IS STILL ABSENT AND THE WEATHER WAS REMARKABLY FINE I NEVER PASSED A DAY WITHOUT SEEING MY TWO FRIENDS MILICENT AND ESTHER EITHER THERE OR HERE
text: Mr. and Mrs. Hutterly, have been seeing it to grow for a fortnight, and as Mr. Hargrave is still absent and the weather was remarkably fine, I never passed a day without seeing my two friends, Millicent and Esther, either there or here.
